response.overview: GUYS GO CRAZY presents another round of seriously hardcore party action with STRIPPER FRENZY! Featuring an all-star stripper cast, including Euroboy porn superstars Gery Owan, Alex Grand and Daniel Student. Dressed as tough guy, a musketeer, and a police officer, the boys hit the stage one by one and slowly remove piece after piece of clothing while gyrating to the music and soon the crowd is whipped into a wild orgiastic frenzy! Before you know it, a bunch of the spectators have joined in the nudity and are sucking and fucking each other senseless until everyone blows their white hot loads, covering the whole crowd in wave after wave of splooge!
response.title: Guys Go Crazy 13: Stripper Frenzy
